news-thai-econ.title: Emerging market currencies, stocks fall on Iran-Israel conflict worries
news-thai-econ.description: A gauge of developing nations’ currencies dropped 0.5%, declining for a second session in a row as the dollar strengthened.

news-global-econ.title: Trump Cabinet alum Ryan Zinke joins mass exodus of lawmakers leaving Congress
news-global-econ.description: GOP Rep. Ryan Zinke announces he will not seek re-election in 2026, citing health issues from his Navy SEAL career as the House Republican exodus continues.
